title: Direction D: Signed Δd Theory

\u0394d=+2.mechanism: Adding exp+log pair = introducing integration measure

\u0394d=+1.mechanism: Adding single exp primitive without log partner

\u0394d=0.mechanism: Self-map: same primitive structure, same depth

examples: Conformal bootstrap solution: crossing eqs(EML-3) → spectrum(EML-2)
RG flow: UV theory(EML-∞) → IR fixed point(EML-2) [Δd=-∞ then +0]
\u0394d=-1.mechanism: Removing one oscillatory/exp layer via averaging/coarse-graining

examples: Wick rotation: oscillatory Z_M(EML-3) → Euclidean Z_E(EML-1)
Thermodynamic limit: partition function(EML-3) → free energy density(EML-1) ... wait
\u0394d=-2.mechanism: Removing exp+log pair: oscillatory → exponential decay
\u0394d=-2.primitive_interpretation: -2 primitives removed (both real primitives at once)
\u0394d=-2.note: Wick rotation: removes complex-exp phase → reduces EML-3→EML-1 (Δd=-2)

examples: RG flow: UV divergence(EML-∞) → perturbative IR(EML-2)
\u0394d=-inf.mechanism: Horizon descent: non-constructive → constructive finite shadow
\u0394d=-inf.primitive_interpretation: Infinite tower collapses to finite number of primitives

encode_then_decode.T2: Shannon entropy H (Δd=0 from EML-2 input)
encode_then_decode.result: EML-2 → EML-2 (entropy of Fourier spectrum, Δd=0+2=2)

algebra.group_structure: Signed Δd forms a group under composition: (Z, +)

signed_theory.key_insight: Signed Δd forms (Z∪{±∞}, +); Fourier and Wick are mutual inverses

key_theorem: The EML Signed Δd Theorem (S234, Direction D): Δd is a signed quantity: Δd ∈ {0, ±1, ±2, ±∞}. Positive Δd: adds primitives (depth increase). Negative Δd: removes primitives (depth reduction). Composition rule: Δd(T₂∘T₁) = Δd(T₁) + Δd(T₂). Inverse rule: Δd(T⁻¹) = -Δd(T). Fourier transform (Δd=+2) and Fourier inverse (Δd=-2) are mutual inverses. Wick rotation (Δd=-2) and analytic continuation (Δd=+2) are mutual inverses. Quantization (Δd=+2) and classical limit (Δd=-2) are mutual inverses. The signed Δd forms the integers Z ∪ {±∞} under composition. The Asymmetry Theorem restricted to POSITIVE operations gives {0,1,2,∞}.
rabbit_hole_log: Fourier=Δd+2, inverse=Δd-2: mutual inverses in the signed Δd group
Wick rotation: Δd=-2 precisely; removes complex exp layer to get real exp
Δd composition: (T₂∘T₁) adds Δd values — signed integer arithmetic
